commands.compress:
usage: __main__.py compress [-h] [--wing WING] [--dry-run] [--config CONFIG]

options:
  -h, --help       show this help message and exit
  --wing WING      Wing to compress (default: all wings)
  --dry-run        Preview compression without storing
  --config CONFIG  Entity config JSON (e.g. entities.json)
commands.init:
usage: __main__.py init [-h] [--yes] dir

positional arguments:
  dir         Project directory to set up

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit
  --yes       Auto-accept all detected entities (non-interactive)
commands.mine:
usage: __main__.py mine [-h] [--mode {projects,convos}] [--wing WING]
                        [--agent AGENT] [--limit LIMIT] [--dry-run]
                        [--extract {exchange,general}]
                        dir

positional arguments:
  dir                   Directory to mine

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --mode {projects,convos}
                        Ingest mode: 'projects' for code/docs (default),
                        'convos' for chat exports
  --wing WING           Wing name (default: directory name)
  --agent AGENT         Your name — recorded on every drawer (default:
                        mempalace)
  --limit LIMIT         Max files to process (0 = all)
  --dry-run             Show what would be filed without filing
  --extract {exchange,general}
                        Extraction strategy for convos mode: 'exchange'
                        (default) or 'general' (5 memory types)
commands.root:
usage: __main__.py [-h] [--palace PALACE]
                   {init,mine,search,compress,wake-up,split,status} ...

MemPalace — Give your AI a memory. No API key required.

positional arguments:
  {init,mine,search,compress,wake-up,split,status}
    init                Detect rooms from your folder structure
    mine                Mine files into the palace
    search              Find anything, exact words
    compress            Compress drawers using AAAK Dialect (~30x reduction)
    wake-up             Show L0 + L1 wake-up context (~600-900 tokens)
    split               Split concatenated transcript mega-files into per-
                        session files (run before mine)
    status              Show what's been filed

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --palace PALACE       Where the palace lives (default: from
                        ~/.mempalace/config.json or ~/.mempalace/palace)

MemPalace — Give your AI a memory. No API key required.

Two ways to ingest:
  Projects:      mempalace mine ~/projects/my_app          (code, docs, notes)
  Conversations: mempalace mine ~/chats/ --mode convos     (Claude, ChatGPT, Slack)

Same palace. Same search. Different ingest strategies.

Commands:
    mempalace init <dir>                  Detect rooms from folder structure
    mempalace split <dir>                 Split concatenated mega-files into per-session files
    mempalace mine <dir>                  Mine project files (default)
    mempalace mine <dir> --mode convos    Mine conversation exports
    mempalace search "query"              Find anything, exact words
    mempalace wake-up                     Show L0 + L1 wake-up context
    mempalace wake-up --wing my_app       Wake-up for a specific project
    mempalace status                      Show what's been filed

Examples:
    mempalace init ~/projects/my_app
    mempalace mine ~/projects/my_app
    mempalace mine ~/chats/claude-sessions --mode convos
    mempalace search "why did we switch to GraphQL"
    mempalace search "pricing discussion" --wing my_app --room costs
commands.search:
usage: __main__.py search [-h] [--wing WING] [--room ROOM] [--results RESULTS]
                          query

positional arguments:
  query              What to search for

options:
  -h, --help         show this help message and exit
  --wing WING        Limit to one project
  --room ROOM        Limit to one room
  --results RESULTS  Number of results
commands.split:
usage: __main__.py split [-h] [--output-dir OUTPUT_DIR] [--dry-run]
                         [--min-sessions MIN_SESSIONS]
                         dir

positional arguments:
  dir                   Directory containing transcript files

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --output-dir OUTPUT_DIR
                        Write split files here (default: same directory as
                        source files)
  --dry-run             Show what would be split without writing files
  --min-sessions MIN_SESSIONS
                        Only split files containing at least N sessions
                        (default: 2)
commands.status:
usage: __main__.py status [-h]

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit
commands.wake-up:
usage: __main__.py wake-up [-h] [--wing WING]

options:
  -h, --help   show this help message and exit
  --wing WING  Wake-up for a specific project/wing
